title: Design Your Business
theme: FEC blocks 4–6 — Capture Value, Enable Value, UVP

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Build your advisory business blueprint
learn.summary: Continue your FEC — Capture Value (revenue, costs, profit), Enable Value (resources & partners), and your Unified Venture Proposition.
bullets: Your Week 2 blocks (segment, problem, value) stay locked as your foundation
Capture Value: how money flows in and out of your practice
Enable Value: resources, partners, and funding to deliver consistently
Canvas wizard walks you through each remaining block step by step
learn.callout: Customer work from Week 2 feeds this week’s canvas continuation.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: FEC design studio
workshop.summary: Facilitated canvas building with squad feedback.
bullets: Fill Capture Value, Enable Value, and UVP with coach guidance
Squad peer review of one canvas block
Identify gaps before Week 4 pitch prep
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your classroom session.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Complete remaining FEC blocks
assignment.summary: Finish Capture Value, Enable Value, and Unified Venture Proposition in the canvas wizard.
bullets: Review your Week 2 blocks at the top of the wizard
Use guided prompts for each new block
Save progress so Week 4 can synthesize your 3-year plan

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: Is your business model clear?
prompts: What will you refine before your venture pitch?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 3 complete
submit.summary: Unlock Week 4 — 3-Year Plan and Venture Pitch (Stage Gate 1).
